text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the spring Tenno Sho at last. The
weather is sunny and clear over the Yodo turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Grandfather, Grandmother. The day has finally
come.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please watch me as I run, and watch the moment I
seize victory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: All right... I'm ready now. I think I can do it!
choice_data_list: Go and give it all you've got!
Go and give it all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I will! Keep your eyes on me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's give it our all as members of the Mejiro
family.
